comment: Compare and install policy for repo-hosted managed tools. Fetched from Git at init/update time.

requireUpstreamChecksum.description: Must use authoritative upstream checksum file (e.g. checksums.txt, SHA256 file). GitHub asset digest is NOT acceptable.

allowGithubDigest.description: No upstream checksum file exists. GitHub automatic asset digest (June 2025+) is the acceptable fallback.
allowGithubDigest.note: GitHub computes SHA256 for every release asset automatically.

upstreamOrGithubDigest.description: Prefer upstream checksum; fall back to GitHub automatic asset digest if no upstream checksum exists.

detection.description: Actual installed versions MUST be detected from binaries/tool managers, never from mounted metadata files.
